hash_7dd427ea8e29301b: ^1Russman: ^7This sure is some weird and crazy shit.
hash_7e0b0f1a25f0decc: ^1Misty: ^7Man, I hope I set the timer right...
hash_7e0b101a25f0e07f: ^1Marlton: ^7Every path I open up is one more escape route.
hash_7e0b161a25f0eab1: ^1Stuhlinger: ^7Every blocked path is a dead end -- and I don't wanna end up dead.
hash_7e15891a25fa029f: ^1Russman: ^7Russman loves a good explosion -- and he's got enough sense to stand clear of it!
hash_7e2787e86f22fe7b: ^1Russman: ^7Dang, I'm good! Not sure why, but I am.
hash_7e3d4b8995ba5e4e: ^1Misty: ^7Meat heads don't seem slowed down any by the extreme cold. Guess they all got used to the rigor mortis.
hash_7e420d38fa03bc27: ^1Richtofen: ^7You should see Nikolai after he's had a few.

hash_7e6b624a6007308f: ^1Misty: ^7Boys, this is not the way to a girl's heart. Or maybe it is.
hash_7e9d9259b0bdcc24: ^1Misty: ^7Play stupid games. Win stupid prizes. Or just lose.
hash_7e9d9359b0bdcdd7: ^1Marlton: ^7Okay, now I just feel stupid. I hate feeling stupid.

hash_7ea2d761ac011c4d: ^1Misty: ^7Hope I can return the favor some day.
hash_7ea81c59b0c70b27: ^1Russman: ^7Well, that was a bit of a goat fuck. I just gotta keep tryin'...

hash_7ebe0db0950af7be: ^1Marlton: ^7Ahh! They are attempting to eviscerate me!
hash_7ebe0eb0950af971: ^1Misty: ^7*Ow!* I don't take that shit from anyone, let alone a walkin' maggotbag!
hash_7ec18cb0950e0562: ^1Russman: ^7Hold still, scum-sucker. Russman's payin' ya back with interest!

hash_7ecc055361fa88af: ^1Marlton: ^7Even with the temperature making the metal brittle, what could bisect a freighter like that?
hash_7ecc0b5361fa92e1: ^1Stuhlinger: ^7Y'know, it's weirdly beautiful out here -- shambling corpses notwithstanding.
hash_7ecdd87d2e8f3c69: ^1Russman: ^7S'like a knife and a slingshot had a baby...

hash_7ed67e536203aacf: ^1Russman: ^7That ship looks broker than Russman's poor brain.
hash_7ef63dbddf844680: ^1Stuhlinger: ^7Now they're sending burning meat-sacks after me. It ain't easy being Sammy boy...
hash_7ef64bbddf845e4a: ^1Marlton: ^7Something ignited that reanimate. Is it some new variety of "deadhead," as Misty might put it?
hash_7ef64cbddf845ffd: ^1Misty: ^7Looks like someone ate the last ghost pepper. Fess up, slackjaw!
hash_7ef9cabddf876bee: ^1Russman: ^7That rot-gobbler's lookin' hot under the collar.
hash_7f1982c9e4e30828: ^1Russman: ^7Russman loves him some explosives, but these are just plain weird.

hash_7f237cc9e4eb527b: ^1Misty: ^7Surprise, right? And again, and again, and again!

hash_7f40040b994919a9: ^1Russman: ^7Is this a jail? How bad would ya have to be for the other mad scientists to lock you up?
hash_7f41578fc46313b1: ^1Russman: ^7It's expensive, but, hey, you get what you pay for.
hash_7f43050b994b5133: ^1Stuhlinger: ^7Must be where they kept the poor schmucks they used as guinea pigs.
hash_7f43120b994b674a: ^1Misty: ^7That feelin' when you see a jail cell and your first thought is to lock yourself inside.
hash_7f43130b994b68fd: ^1Marlton: ^7The cots in those cells have actual mattresses. When was the last time I got some sleep?
hash_7f44d58fc4661fa2: ^1Misty: ^7This thing makes five seconds feel like forever.
hash_7f44d68fc4662155: ^1Marlton: ^7Not even Einstein could explain this machine...but who cares?
hash_7f44d88fc46624bb: ^1Stuhlinger: ^7Wish I could stick Marlton in this thing. Freakin' pantywaist...

hash_7f52fd6d7cf1ff57: ^1Marlton: ^7I'm...not crazy about heights. That's going to be a problem today, isn't it?
hash_7f5c681dce46cf6c: ^1Marlton: ^7I sincerely hope that your friend provides more regular -- and detailed -- updates than he has done in the past. We went on quite the journey procuring his book!

hash_7f62eecbbd345b81: ^1Russman: ^7A proper dock has a bait shop -- live nightcrawlers, cold

hash_7fc678e84b893b21: ^1Marlton: ^7"I haven't failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that don't work." Edison said that.
